headline: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
summary: Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters.

raw.headline: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?

headline: Here’s how Gen Z is shaping the box office
summary: Gen Z and millennials are driving box office growth. Members of these younger generations are seeing more movies per year and spending more per trip than older generations. In 2025, Gen Z moviegoers averaged about seven movies a year and made up roughly 40% of all audiences in North America, according to data from Comscore.
